## **2.2.2.I. PI #9**

### **What initiatives were implemented or are planned that will improve this PI and how does the NSA intend on monitoring their effectiveness on performance?**

NSA MIL monitors values and promotes a better adjustments on the booked them to the needs. 2025 shows a reduction in the amount of allocated hours, showing an effort to increase the efficiency in the planning process. It is worth to highlight that Spain provides with actual use figures, instead of ERSA.

This indicator is provided by the Spanish Air Force NSA.
